scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; PORT_TO_KILL=${API_PORT:-3001}; if command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then fuser -k ${PORT_TO_KILL}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; elif command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -ti tcp:${PORT_TO_KILL} | xargs -r kill -9 || true; fi; nest start --watch'
scripts.worker:dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; nest start --watch --entryFile worker-main'
scripts.media:dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; nest start --watch --entryFile media-main'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; nest build'
scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; node dist/main.js'
scripts.worker:start: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; node dist/worker-main.js'
scripts.media:start: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; node dist/media-main.js'
scripts.prisma:generate: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.prisma:studio: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; prisma studio --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.seed:academic:backfill: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; . ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; node prisma/scripts/seed-academic-backfill.mjs'
